proposal1.heroHeadline: Vc1phx is losing hours worth $10,000 monthly on manual proposal writing.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting proposals manually for your services drains time. Automated generation takes just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every moment spent manually on proposals results in significant losses.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Each proposal takes hours to draft, which could be used to secure new clients. Multiply this by dozens of proposals, and you're bleeding $10,000 monthly.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean lost opportunities. Every delayed hour could mean a client choosing a competitor.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals often lack uniformity. Inconsistency can cost you brand recognition and trust, impacting your bottom line.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled employees to manually create proposals is costly. You're spending thousands monthly on this inefficiency.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Human error in proposals can lead to misinformation. Each mistake could cost you a deal or damage your reputation.

problems.title: Inefficient Tracking
problems.description: Without automation, tracking proposal status is cumbersome. This inefficiency costs you potential follow-ups and closes.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Replace every inefficiency above with an AI-driven streamlined process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. With our system, they are ready in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals often vary in style. Our system ensures every document aligns with your brand.

solutions.title: Real-Time Tracking
solutions.description: Tracking proposals manually is a hassle. This system provides real-time updates and insights.

solutions.title: AI Chatbot
solutions.description: Current communication is slow and manual. The AI chatbot answers client queries instantly.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual entry leads to mistakes. Our system minimizes errors with accurate, automated data handling.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Vc1phx's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Vc1phx around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Vc1phx.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Boost Revenue with Targeted Marketing Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our plan transforms your outreach, converting visitors into loyal customers. Let's drive meaningful engagement together.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing significant revenue due to unoptimized marketing strategies.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor leaving your site without engaging is potential revenue lost. This affects your bottom line significantly.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Current conversion rates are below industry average. This means missed opportunities to turn interest into sales.

problems.title: Underutilized Social Media
problems.description: Social media channels are not fully leveraged, resulting in lost engagement opportunities with potential customers.

problems.title: Ineffective Email Campaigns
problems.description: Open rates and click-through rates are not meeting targets, leading to a decrease in potential sales.

problems.title: Poor Brand Visibility
problems.description: Without strong brand presence, Acme Corp is losing out on capturing market share and customer loyalty.

problems.title: Stagnant Digital Growth
problems.description: Digital channels are not yielding the expected growth, causing a plateau in reaching new audiences.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address these revenue-impacting issues.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Improves search engine rankings, driving more organic traffic to your site.

solutions.title: Email Marketing Revamp
solutions.description: Enhances email campaigns to increase open and click-through rates, boosting sales.

solutions.title: Social Media Strategy
solutions.description: Leverages social platforms to build brand awareness and customer engagement.

solutions.title: Website Redesign
solutions.description: A modern, user-friendly design that converts visitors into customers.
